title: Allowlist RPL multicast before replay
description: Accept RPL control only for local unicast or ff02::1a; reject unrelated multicast before link replay consumption when destination is inspectable.
acceptance_criteria: ff02::1a RPL control is accepted; unrelated multicast is ignored/rejected without consuming sender replay; application multicast membership remains outside RplStack.
close_reason: Restricted inspectable RPL multicast to ff02::1a before link replay mutation and repeated the multicast gate after authentication, while preserving local L2 unicast transit forwarding and non-RPL application multicast. Added same-sequence replay regression. Full node suite and strict scoped Clippy pass.
